episodes.title: Teapot
episodes.description: Through Teapot's incredible interview, we learn about one version of a foster care trafficking ring, listen to the experiences and parallels between trafficking and religious cults, hear about Teapot's passion of disability justice, what it means to be in "survival mode," how Teapot found community through the homeless community, and so much more. We are so honored to hear from Teapot, and gain so much insight from their story about what human trafficking looks like and how it can affect someone in a cycle of disabling conditions. You do not want to miss this episode!

episodes.title: Kya - Part 2
episodes.description: Listen in on the second part of Kya's incredible story. We dive deep into the intricate dynamics of Kya's trafficking escape, contemplate the effects of trauma bonds, and celebrate the restoration and recovery of a survivor's identity. This shorter episode is packed full of wisdom, hope, story, and insight.

episodes.title: Kya - Part 1
episodes.description: This incredible conversation dives deep into the complexities of sex trafficking dynamics throughout the culture of sexual exploitation. Join us in a discussion with Kya about their indigenous identity, the different roles that traffickers played in their life, as well as the grief that pairs in a survivor's story. This episode is part 1 of 2 - the second part of this episode launches on April 25th, 2026! Stay tuned, and join us!

episodes.title: Shira
episodes.description: Listen in on a conversation with Shira, a local trauma therapist. Shira and Elliot walk through therapeutic topics from a trafficking survivor perspective, such as: the process of building trust, identifying the "perfect victim" complex, comparing symptoms versus survival skills, practicing empathy and understanding for the self, and tolerating activation around the release of the Epstein Files. Follow along as Elliot and Shira contemplate the spectrum of healing, establishing safety, and the important recognition that we are all deserving of healing.

episodes.title: Dante
episodes.description: Join us in a conversation surrounding the challenges of homelessness after leaving abusive environments, black voices in the sex trafficking industry, the power of metaphor throughout creativity, and incredible stories shared by a brave sex trafficking survivor from New York City.

episodes.title: Elliot & Holly
episodes.description:
Starting the conversation: a journey of topics from self-care in our current political climate, connection to community versus isolation of the trafficking system, and intersectional queer identities. Join us for an episode of discussing what it means to "be safe" in our communities, our personal timelines of cultural awareness, and a peek into what the sex trafficking world looked like through Elliot's perspective.
Interested in being interviewed for future episodes? Email flourishedinfreedom@gmail.com.
